title: Evidence Upload — Process Flow
content: flowchart TD

start([START: User initiates evidence upload
POST /api/v1/actions/id/evidence
Body: file_name, content_type, file_size, description])
s1[1. Validate file metadata]

d1{File type allowed?
check against allowed content types}

stop400([END - 400 Bad Request
File type not allowed])
d2{File size within limits?}

stop413([END - 413 Payload Too Large
File size exceeds maximum])

s2[2. Generate pre-signed URL for Azure Blob Storage
Container: evidence/tenant_id/action_id/
Blob name: UUID_v7_sanitized_file_name
SAS token: write-only, 1-hour expiry default]

s3[3. Return pre-signed URL to client
Response: upload_url, evidence_id, expires_at]

s4[4. Client uploads file directly to Azure Blob Storage
PUT upload_url with file content
Bypasses API server — direct browser-to-blob upload]

s5[5. Client confirms upload completion
PUT /api/v1/actions/id/evidence/evidence_id/confirm]

s6[6. OWASP-compliant file validation
Validate magic bytes match declared content_type
Validate file type against allowed whitelist
Validate file size within 50MB limit]

s7[7. Compute SHA-256 hash of uploaded blob content
Store hash on evidence record for integrity verification]

s8[8. Create ActionEvidence record with blob reference
INSERT actions.action_evidence
id, action_id, file_name, content_type, file_size,
blob_path, sha256_hash, uploaded_by, description]

s9[9. Record ActionAuditEvent - evidence uploaded
INSERT actions.action_audit_events
action_id, event_type='evidence.uploaded',
actor_id, details]
s10[10. Return 200 OK with evidence DTO]
stop([END])
start --> s1 --> d1
d1 -->|No| stop400
d1 -->|Yes| d2
d2 -->|No| stop413
